name: codescene
description: CodeScene Code Health analysis. Optional — only enable if you have a CodeScene Cloud account. The validator calls this for code-health scoring on the diff.

tools.name: codescene_health_check
tools.description: Run Code Health analysis on a file or diff. Returns a 0-10 health score per file plus hotspots.

tools.name: codescene_code_review
tools.description: Run a code review on a diff. Returns findings categorized as 'must-fix', 'should-fix', 'consider'.

envVars.name: CS_ACCESS_TOKEN
envVars.description: CodeScene Cloud access token. Get from codescene.io → Account → API Access.
